# <div>Remember that these steps don't always have to happen in order – sometimes,

## Context
From document: Week 1 | Overview — chunk 14 (chunk 14/75)

## Content
<div>Remember that these steps don't always have to happen in order – sometimes, you might need to go back and revise after drafting several times or do some pre-writing midway through editing. Experiment until you find what works best for you! </div>
